customer_message: Hi, I'm trying to log into the portal but it says my account is locked. Can you unlock it?
company_response: Hello, I have reviewed your account and it appears to be locked due to multiple failed login attempts. I have sent a password reset link to your email. Please follow the link to unlock your account and reset your password.

customer_message: The reporting section in the dashboard is not loading data for the last month. It just stays blank.
company_response: Hi there. We experienced a temporary issue with our reporting database replication yesterday which affected dashboard data loading. We have applied a fix this morning. Please clear your browser cache and try again. If the issue persists, let us know.

customer_message: I need to add three new users to our enterprise plan. How do I do this?
company_response: Hello! To add new users to your enterprise plan, navigate to Settings > User Management in your admin portal. Click 'Invite User', enter their email addresses, and select their roles. They will receive an invitation email to set up their accounts.

customer_message: Can you review my API integration code? I keep getting a 401 Unauthorized error when calling the /users endpoint.
company_response: Thanks for reaching out. A 401 error usually indicates an issue with the API key or authentication token. Please ensure you are passing the 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>' header in your request. Also, verify that your API key has not expired in your developer settings. If you still have trouble, please send a code snippet of how you are making the request, ensuring you redact the actual API key.

customer_message: We just want to say how much we appreciate your quick support last week!
company_response: Thank you so much for the kind words! We strive to provide the best possible support to our customers. If you ever need anything else, don't hesitate to reach out.
